items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in the Amasty Order Attributes extension allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows attackers to achieve remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront request.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce | APSB26-49
items.summary: This security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API allowing unauthenticated attackers to upload executable polyglot files, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce | APSB26-05
items.summary: This critical security update addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.

items.title: SessionReaper, unauthenticated RCE in Magento & Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical improper input validation flaw, also known as 'SessionReaper,' allows customer account takeover and unauthenticated remote code execution, with active exploitation observed in the wild.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization bypass (read access)
items.summary: An Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Adobe Commerce allows an attacker to bypass security measures and gain read access.

items.title: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
items.summary: A Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Adobe Commerce could result in privilege escalation if a high-privileged attacker tricks a victim into executing unintended actions.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce - APSB25-50
items.summary: This update resolves critical and important vulnerabilities, including stored cross-site scripting (CVE-2025-47110), reflected XSS, and a one-click account takeover issue.

items.title: CosmicSting attack & defense overview
items.summary: A critical vulnerability allowing attackers to read any files, such as passwords and secret keys, and potentially inject malware or achieve remote code execution when combined with another bug.
